summary: External connections (local LoRA/upscale) in remote mode. Spun from MPI-81 ID collision.
Phased plan attached (Phase 1 guard+warn now; Phase 2 upload gated on MPI-81 rebuild).
Phase 1 implemented (5 files): /comfy/models/remote-presence, state keys, assetService annotate, MpiModelSettings flag, commandExecutor guard. node --check + eslint pass.

Phase 0 revert + Phase 1 local drag-drop done (12 files). New: /comfy/import-model, /comfy/model-folders, MpiFolderDrop. Live route probes OK (model-folders returns primary+extras; bad bucket 400; import validation 400).

Phase 1b: fixed pre-existing Windows path-separator bug surfaced during LoRA test. list-files now emits ENGINE-OS separator (local Windows backslash, remote forward); injection + picker resolve saved values separator-agnostically (no project.json migration). Logic verified offline vs ComfyUI enum. Needs app RESTART for backend route to reload, then subfolder-LoRA gen test.

USER verified drag-drop (LoRA+upscale) + missing-LoRA red/block. Added upscale warn+fallback: missing upscale no longer blocks — falls back to SIAX + ui:warning, red (missing) in picker (commandExecutor _resolveUpscaleParam; guard now LoRA-only). Spun MPI-84 for toast truncation (line-clamp:2). Syntax+ESLint clean.

Fixed: dropping a model on the settings modal in gallery workspace left the gallery media-drop overlay stuck open. Cause: MpiFolderDrop drop called stopPropagation, so the gallery's window-level _onDrop (which only hides the overlay + resets _dragCounter) never fired. Removed stopPropagation (kept preventDefault); gallery imports via its own overlay element so no double-import. Syntax+ESLint clean.

Model Settings picker now live-rerenders: subscribes to state:changed for availableLoras/upscaleModels while open and re-runs el.open(_context). Folder removal + drag-drop import now reflect (red flag set/cleared) without close-reopen. Dropped the redundant explicit el.open in onImport (loadAssets fires the rebuild). Cleanup via _unsubs in destroy. Syntax+ESLint clean.

Fixed regression: the live-rerender subscription referenced _unsubs/_isOpen/_context above their declarations (TDZ) → ReferenceError aborted MpiModelSettings setup → gallery failed to mount PromptBox. Moved the declarations to the top of setup(). Syntax+ESLint clean.

Fixed duplicate drop zones + LoRA-drop-not-updating (same root cause). The live-rerender (state:changed) re-invoked el.open while a prior async _renderDropZones fetch was pending → both appended → duplicate zones; dropping onto a stale duplicate (removed-folder path) got rejected by import allow-list → no refresh. Fix: render-token guard (bumped on _clearDropZones), bail stale renders post-await, clear host AFTER await not before. USER confirmed prompt box restored + external-models-missing + upscale drop all working.

Resolved red-vs-'already exists' contradiction (saved subfolder path gone, same file now at folder root). Heal-on-resolve: unique basename match -> silently update stored path (picker persists via _autoSave + injection heals), so not red and generation loads it; ambiguous (multiple same-name files across folders) -> stays red, user re-picks (no silent wrong-file). _resolveInfo/_isMissing reworked; _findMissingModel + _resolveUpscaleParam aligned to resolvability. Offline logic test 7/7. Syntax+ESLint clean.

Phase 1 accepted by user; maturity validating. Phase 2/3 remote pending under MPI-64. UNRELEASED.md changelog updated (drag-drop import, missing feedback, subfolder-separator fix, relocated-model heal).
Attention required: remote validation pending (Phase 2/3, gated on MPI-81). Checklist trimmed to that single open box for visibility.
